name: Steak Lo Mein (Ngo Yoke Lo Mein: Canton
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions. Drain.
2. Slice steak against the grain into thin pieces about 2 inches long.
3. Shred carrot and celery.
4. Mix steak, ginger, scallion, cornstarch, sugar, and 1 tablespoon light soy sauce in a bowl. Set aside.
5. Mix salt and 1 tablespoon light soy sauce in a separate bowl.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
7. Stir in the steak mixture and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
8. Remove from the pan and set aside.
9. Add shredded carrot and celery to the same pan. Stir and add 1/4 cup water, lower the heat, and cover.
10. Cook for 2 minutes. If using cabbage, add it with the celery at this stage.
11. Add bean sprouts and stir a few seconds.
12. Add cooked spaghetti to the pan and stir well. Cook for 2 more minutes.
13. Return the steak mixture to the pan and mix in the salt and soy sauce mixture.
14. Mix well and serve.
